aiCommentCN: 跌的时候想抄底，抄完继续跌得慌
aiCommentEN: Falling prices make us want to buy, but it keeps dropping
aiSummaryCN:
【交易观点】
比特币短期内可能会出现小幅波动。
【关键位置】
77,000 美元以下为关键支撑位，80,000 美元以上为关键阻力位。
【短线策略】
低位买入，高位卖出为主。
【风险提醒】
市场波动较大，交易需谨慎。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin may experience minor fluctuations in the short term.
[Key Drivers]
$77,000 is the key support level, and $80,000 is the key resistance level.
[Outlook]
Buying at low points and selling at high points is the main strategy.
[Reminder]
The market is highly volatile, so trade with caution.
